phrases.intent_en: Ask where the ferry terminal is
phrases.text_local: Disculpe, ¿cómo llego a la terminal de ferries?
phrases.pronunciation: Dees-KOOL-peh, ¿KOH-moh YEH-goh ah lah tehr-mee-NAHL deh FEH-rees?

likely_response.local: Gire a la izquierda, frente al muelle.
likely_response.pronunciation: HEE-reh AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah FREHN-teh AHL moo-EHL-leh

responses.phonetic: HEE-reh AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah FREHN-teh AHL moo-EHL-leh
responses.french: Gire a la izquierda, frente al muelle.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the port viewing platform is
phrases.text_local: ¿Dónde está la plataforma de observación del puerto?
phrases.pronunciation: DOHN-deh eh-STAH lah plah-tah-FOHR-mah deh ohb-sehr-vah-SYOHN del PWEHR-toh?

likely_response.local: Suba al Mirador de Itsaslur, junto al puente.
likely_response.pronunciation: SOO-bah AHL mee-rah-DOHR DEH eet-sah-SLOOR HOON-toh AHL poo-EHN-teh
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs towards the north of the pier.

responses.english: Follow the signs towards the north of the pier.
responses.phonetic: SOO-bah AHL mee-rah-DOHR DEH eet-sah-SLOOR HOON-toh AHL poo-EHN-teh
responses.french: Suba al Mirador de Itsaslur, junto al puente.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to book a port tour
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿cómo puedo reservar una visita guiada por el puerto?
phrases.pronunciation: boo-EH-nohs DÍ-ahs KÓ-moh poo-EH-doh reh-sehr-BAHR OO-nah bee-SEE-tah g-ee-AH-dah POHR EHL poo-EHR-toh

likely_response.local: En taquilla Marzana, junto a la entrada.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN tah-k-EEL-lah mahr-THAH-nah HOON-toh AH LAH ehnt-RAH-dah
likely_response.translation_en: At the Marzana ticket office, by the entrance.

responses.english: At the Marzana ticket office, by the entrance.
responses.phonetic: EHN tah-k-EEL-lah mahr-THAH-nah HOON-toh AH LAH ehnt-RAH-dah
responses.french: En taquilla Marzana, junto a la entrada.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the port information office is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la oficina de información del puerto?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, DOHN-de es-TAH lah o-fee-SEE-nah de in-for-mah-SYON del PWER-to?

likely_response.local: En el edificio principal, a la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN EHL eh-dee-fee-THEE-oh preen-thee-PAHL AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: In the main building, on the right.

responses.english: In the main building, on the right.
responses.phonetic: EHN EHL eh-dee-fee-THEE-oh preen-thee-PAHL AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.french: En el edificio principal, a la derecha.
